---
title: Plain Markdown
---

Heading
=======

A paragraph that is long enough to need rewrapping once the formatter gets hold of it, with a [link](https://example.com) in it.

* one
* two
    * nested
* three

1. first
1. second

| col | other |
|--|:-:|
| a | b |

> [!WARNING]
> An alert.

Term with ~~strikethrough~~ and `inline code`.

    indented code block

```py
def f():

    return 1
```

<!-- an ordinary HTML comment -->

[^1]: A footnote.

Text with a footnote reference[^1].
